description: Live DB-backed inferred-thread evaluation subset built from real parsed messages with deterministic inferred-thread enrichment.

cases.question: Which inferred-only thread does the June 3 mobiles Arbeiten reply from the Personalrat belong to?
cases.expected_answer: The reply belongs to inferred thread aq23-mobiles-arbeiten.
